productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Casual Purple Backpack
description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It's a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. American Tourister are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 41 cm Width: 29 cm Depth: 17 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of polyester for durability Two main zipped compartments with a laptop sleeve One zipped compartment on the front with organizer pouches and a key-holder One ear-phones gate One mesh open mouthed pocket on the left side for enhanced space One zipped side pocket on the right side Padded haul loop for easy carrying Two adjustable shoulder straps made of polyester and mesh panels at the back for breathable comfort Branded zips and branding appliqué d on the front Back padding for comfort Rubber toes at the base Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary
